name: Amazon Q Developer Pro
description: Paid Amazon Q Developer plan for higher agentic usage, administrator controls, and organizational developer assistance.

features.feature_description: Higher included agentic usage than Free; exact quotas can vary by AWS account and feature.
AWS describes Amazon Q Developer as providing access to the latest Claude models, but does not publish stable underlying model IDs for the subscription plan.
Includes administrative controls and enterprise-oriented user management.
